## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Logic and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production process.](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented their AI-powered content generation platform (Atlas) and workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on workflow automation, targeting both SEO and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Next steps: Logic to review content strategy, GrowthX to prepare content calendar and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Logistics around CMS, publishing, and performance tracking were discussed](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Process

  - [Atlas platform used for AI-assisted content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Workflow: Assignment generation → Article generation (including research, outlining, drafting)](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Two rounds of revisions typically needed, aiming for minimal edits over time](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [GrowthX handles publishing; CMS access needed (alternatives discussed for Logic's setup)](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Primary focus: Workflow automation keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1708.0)
  - [Four topic clusters identified:](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
    1.  Workflow and process automation (top/middle funnel)
    2.  Automation for business users (bottom funnel, product-focused)
    3.  Industry-specific automation (e.g., fintech, e-commerce, logistics)
    4.  AI and automation trends (thought leadership)
  - [Strategy aims to build topical authority and differentiate Logic from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

### Performance Tracking and Visibility

  - [SEMrush used for keyword tracking and growth reports](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Looker dashboard to be set up (requires Google Search Console and GA4 access)](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Scrunch tool introduced for tracking AI visibility across LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)

### Visual Content and Promotion

  - [GrowthX can generate featured/hero images for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [LinkedIn promotion of content to be explored further](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Logic to review content strategy document and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1984.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct keyword research and prepare content calendar in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up on LinkedIn social post support](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Logic to consider CMS options or alternative publishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up performance tracking tools (SEMrush, Looker, Scrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/Ykd6sdsDyFPxxcGnov-Cdc6tvX391wWY?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
